Bash(docker network inspect sql-tarcing-prisma-demo_default 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)[0]
print\('Network:', data['Name']\)
print\('Containers:'\)
for cid, info in data.get\('Containers', {}\).items\(\):
    print\(f'  {info[\\"Name\\"]}: {info[\\"IPv4Address\\"]}'\)" 2>&1)
